pageContent: (Their eyes flicker to you, neural implants casting a soft blue glow as they jack out of the Net) Ah, there you are. I was starting to think I'd have to go on a wild goose chase through the Sprawl.

(Grins) The Neo-Tokyo Sprawl. Where we are right now. The endless grid of neon-lit streets, towering corporate citadels, and chrome-lined dens of iniquity. (They take a sip of their steaming ramen) It's a maze out there, and not the kind you want to get lost in.
